body:
## SDK Generation Completed ✅

SDK generation has been triggered and completed for all languages for the **Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS)** TypeSpec project (`specification/containerservice/resource-manager/Microsoft.ContainerService/aks`, API version `2026-02-01`).

### SDK Pull Requests

| Language | Package | SDK Pull Request | Pipeline |
|----------|---------|-----------------|----------|
| Python | `azure-mgmt-containerservice` | https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-python/pull/46401 | [Build 6178329](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/internal/_build/results?buildId=6178329) |
| Java | `azure-resourcemanager-containerservice` | https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-java/pull/48863 | [Build 6178330](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/internal/_build/results?buildId=6178330) |
| Go | `sdk/resourcemanager/containerservice/armcontainerservice` | https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-go/pull/26623 | [Build 6178332](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/internal/_build/results?buildId=6178332) |
| JavaScript | `@azure/arm-containerservice` | https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/pull/38211 | [Build 6178333](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/internal/_build/results?buildId=6178333) |
| .NET | `Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService` | https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/pull/58342 | [Build 6178335](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/internal/_build/results?buildId=6178335) |

All PRs are currently in **draft** status. The release plan has been updated with the SDK generation details.

sdk pr for Python: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-python/pull/46401
sdk pr for Java: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-java/pull/48863
sdk pr for Go: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-go/pull/26623
sdk pr for JavaScript: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/pull/38211
sdk pr for .NET: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/pull/58342
